title: More Craftings of Runes  [More Magic Series]
description: More way to obtain your favorite Rune!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Runes
### Strongly recommended
- Roughly Enough Items - to see the added recipes!
- The Great Alchemical Compendium - potions that grants powerfull bonus but only for a limited time!
# ✨ Features
This mod adds new recipes to obtain Runes, also for soul and lightning ones.
